items.name: Style & Conventions
items.description: Consistent formatting, naming, imports, and typing across the codebase.

items.name: Duplication & Complexity
items.description: Eliminate duplicate logic/config and reduce unnecessary complexity.

items.name: Readability & Refactor
items.description: Refactor for clarity; extract functions; simplify control flow.

items.name: Error Handling
items.description: Handle errors explicitly; avoid silent failures; propagate safely.

items.name: Observability & Logging
items.description: Use structured logs with context; enable traceability.

items.name: UI Robustness
items.description: Prevent leaks and jank; responsive layouts; safe teardown.

items.name: API Conventions
items.description: Correct status codes, response shapes, and API semantics.

items.name: Module Boundaries & Architecture
items.description: Clear module boundaries, decoupling, and managed deprecations.

items.name: Security Hardening
items.description: Sanitize and validate I/O; minimize attack surface.

items.name: Performance & Efficiency
items.description: Optimize hot paths, memory, and I/O for speed and cost.

items.name: Maintainability
items.description: Centralize config, remove dead code, and ease future changes.

items.name: Dependency & Supply Chain
items.description: Pin versions, use digests/SBOMs, and enforce license policies.

items.name: Secrets & Credentials
items.description: Block secrets in code and enforce secure secret handling.

items.name: Config & Environment
items.description: Validate required env/config at startup; fail fast on misconfig.

items.name: CI/CD & Build Hygiene
items.description: Deterministic pipelines, caches, and reproducible builds.

items.name: Container & Docker Hygiene
items.description: Multi-stage builds, minimal bases, .dockerignore, and layer order.

items.name: Infrastructure as Code
items.description: Secure, tagged, and consistent Terraform/K8s resources.

items.name: Monorepo Hygiene
items.description: Workspace boundaries, dependency rules, and build graph health.

items.name: PR Hygiene
items.description: Right-sized PRs with clear titles, descriptions, and checklists.

items.name: Testing & Quality
items.description: Meaningful tests, coverage signals, and fewer flakiness patterns.

items.name: Migrations & Backward Compatibility
items.description: Safe data/code migrations while preserving compatibility.

items.name: Docs & ADRs
items.description: Require docs/ADRs for impactful changes and decisions.

items.name: Repository Context (Files)
items.description: Rules that rely on reading specific repository files the user references (e.g., OpenAPI specs, DoD, design system docs).

items.name: External Context (MCPs)
items.description: Rules that validate changes using external systems via installed MCPs (tickets, monitoring, incidents, vulnerabilities).

items.name: Privacy & PII
items.description: Minimize, mask, and retain personal data responsibly.

items.name: Accessibility (A11y)
items.description: Accessible UI: labels, contrast, keyboard navigation.

items.name: Internationalization (i18n)
items.description: No hardcoded strings; correct pluralization and fallbacks.

items.name: Database & Query Performance
items.description: Avoid N+1s; use indexes; deterministic ordering.

items.name: Resilience (Retries & Idempotency)
items.description: Retries, timeouts, and idempotency for calls and jobs.

items.name: Concurrency Safety
items.description: Guard critical sections and prevent race conditions.

items.name: Caching Strategy
items.description: Correct keys, TTLs, and invalidation for effective caches.

items.name: API Contracts & Versioning
items.description: Schema diffs and versioning to avoid breaking clients.

items.name: GDPR Compliance
items.description: Code practices aligned with EU GDPR and privacy by design.

items.name: SOC 2 Essentials
items.description: Logging, encryption, access, and auditability aligned to SOC 2.

items.name: PCI DSS Compliance
items.description: Protect cardholder data with encryption and segregation.

items.name: HIPAA Compliance
items.description: Protect PHI with controls and auditable access.

items.name: React (Stack)
items.description: React-specific best practices and common pitfalls.

items.name: Next.js (Stack)
items.description: SSR/SSG patterns, routing, and API best practices.

items.name: Vue (Stack)
items.description: Reactivity, props, and component hygiene in Vue.

items.name: Node.js (Stack)
items.description: Async, streams, and dependency hygiene in Node.

items.name: PHP (Stack)
items.description: PHP/Laravel/Symfony patterns for safety and clarity.

items.name: Python (Stack)
items.description: Typing, async, and env hygiene in Python/Django/FastAPI.

items.name: Flutter (Stack)
items.description: Widget lifecycle, dispose, and state management.

items.name: Web Assets & Performance
items.description: Optimize images/fonts; caching and delivery for fast apps.

items.name: Docstrings & Documentation Comments
items.description: Require structured docstrings or documentation comments for public APIs across supported languages (Python, JS/TS, Java, C#, Go, Rust). Must include purpose, parameters, return values, errors, and examples where applicable.
